data.text: Hi Mr. Carter, I’m Dr. Lee. What brings you in today?
I’ve had stomach pain since yesterday and it keeps getting worse.
Where is the pain located now?
Mostly in the lower right side now.
No, it started around my belly button yesterday and then moved.
Have you had fever or chills?
Yes, I had both this morning.
I’ve been nauseous and threw up once.
Does it hurt more when you walk or move?
Yes, walking makes it much worse.

Your blood pressure is low and your heart rate is high. I’m concerned this may be a serious abdominal infection, possibly appendicitis with rupture. We need immediate IV fluids, antibiotics, and emergency department evaluation.
